name: 11L + XSA(last4) + EMA + TrigramHash + Int5MLP + BigramHash(2048) + OrthoInit + MuonWD=0.04
blurb: 11 layers with XSA (Exclusive Self Attention, arXiv:2603.09078) on last 4 layers, EMA weight averaging (decay=0.997), and TrigramHash embedding (1024 buckets, dim=64) for 3-gram context. BigramHash reduced to 2048 buckets to fit 11L in artifact budget. Mixed int5(MLP)/int6(attn,bigram,trigram) + int8(embed tables) + zstd-22. Mean of 3 seeds: TBD.
author: vighaneshs
